summary: Club Plans Entitlements V2 testing complete. All 32 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests verified: Core Director OS (inbox, outbox, signals, coach health) visible on ALL plans including Starter. Starter shows 'Basic' badges and inline upgrade nudges. Club Pro shows trends in signals and workload bars in coach health. AI Program Brief correctly access-gated (shows upgrade card on non-Elite plans). Club Billing page shows all 5 plans with correct pricing. Coach login works without Club Billing access.
critical_code_review_comments: club_plans.py: New 3-type entitlement system correctly implemented (access=bool, depth=str, limit=int)
club_plans.py: Core Director OS (inbox, outbox, signals, coach health, escalations) have access=True on ALL plans
club_plans.py: Starter has basic depth (signal_detail_level=basic, coach_health_detail_level=basic, ai_detail_level=preview)
club_plans.py: Growth has detailed signals, 100 inbox limit, advanced_filters_access=True, csv_export_access=True
club_plans.py: Club Pro has unlimited inbox (-1), advanced signals, detailed coach health, bulk_actions_access=True, autopilot_access=True
club_plans.py: Elite has ai_brief_access=True, ai_detail_level=full, automation_access=True, weekly_digest_access=True, loop_insights_access=True
club_plans.py: Enterprise has sso_access=True, admin_panel_access=True, athlete_limit=-1 (unlimited)
routers/club_plans.py: POST /api/club-plans/set correctly returns 403 for coach role
PlanContext.js: Correctly provides can(), hasDepth(), getDepth(), getLimit(), getValue() hooks
DirectorView.js: Core OS modules (inbox, outbox, signals, coach health) are NOT wrapped in PlanGate access checks - always shown
DirectorView.js: AI Program Brief correctly uses access gating (ai_brief_access)
RecruitingSignalsCard.js: Shows 'Basic' badge on basic depth, shows trends on detailed+ depth, shows inline upgrade nudge on basic
CoachHealthCard.js: Shows 'Basic' badge on basic depth, shows workload bars on detailed+ depth, shows inline upgrade nudge on basic
ClubBillingPage.js: Updated feature lists reflecting new philosophy (Core OS on all plans, depth/limits vary)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing demo accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Club Plans Entitlements V2 testing complete (iteration 245). The new 3-type entitlement system is working correctly: access (bool), depth (basic/detailed/advanced/full), limit (int, -1=unlimited). Key change from old system: Core Director OS modules (inbox, outbox, signals, coach health, escalations) are ALWAYS visible on all plans - they are NOT hidden behind PlanGate access checks. Instead, lower tiers get limited depth/items with tasteful inline upgrade nudges. Only AI Brief uses access gating (it's not part of the core OS). Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_club_plans_entitlements_v2.py cover all 5 plan tiers and their specific entitlements. Frontend verified: Starter shows Basic badges and nudges, Club Pro shows trends and workload bars, AI Brief shows upgrade card on non-Elite plans.

frontend_starter_plan.recruiting_signals_inline_nudge: PASS - 'See trends and deeper signal analysis with Growth'
frontend_starter_plan.coach_health_inline_nudge: PASS - 'Unlock workload tracking and quick actions with Club Pro'
frontend_starter_plan.ai_program_brief_upgrade_card: PASS - 'Available on Elite and above' with 'Upgrade to Elite' button

frontend_club_pro_plan.recruiting_signals_shows_trends: PASS - '+6 this week', 'same as last week', '+12 this week'

frontend_club_billing.all_5_plan_cards: PASS - starter, growth, club_pro, elite, enterprise
frontend_club_billing.plan_switching: PASS - toast shows 'Plan updated to Club Pro'
